statement: In every magma, Equation 2732 (`x = ((y * x) * (z * w)) * u`) implies Equation 3404 (`x * y = z * (y * (z * x))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0768
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op (op y x) (op z w)) u)) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, (op x y) = (op z (op y (op z x)))
